---
title : "Justification Trajectories for Pension Inequality in Chile (2016-2023): The Role of Social Class and Beliefs in Meritocracy"
date : "2026-04-01"
author : "Castillo, Juan Carlos; Canales, Rene; Laffert, Andreas & Urzua, Tomas"
categories : ["Presentation"]
publication : " InEquality Conference. Panel 17: Meritocracy and Inequality Beliefs. Universitat Konstanz "
publication_short : " InEquality Conference. Panel 17: Meritocracy and Inequality Beliefs. Universitat Konstanz "
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
---
<iframe
src="https://jus-mer.github.io/stratification-market-justice/presentations/In_equality-Conference-2026/In_equality-Conference-2026.html#/justification-trajectories-for-pension-inequality-in-chile-20162023"
title="Xaringan presentation"
style="width: 100%; max-width: 100%; height: 450px; border: 0;"
allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture"
allowfullscreen>
</iframe>


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Castillo, Juan Carlos; Canales, Rene; Laffert, Andreas & Urzua, Tomas (2026). *Justification Trajectories for Pension Inequality in Chile (2016-2023): The Role of Social Class and Beliefs in Meritocracy*.  InEquality Conference. Panel 17: Meritocracy and Inequality Beliefs. Universitat Konstanz 

:::
